nat1:

(The DM looks at you, and very slowly denies with the head)

– Nat. 1 –
You're about to feel undescribable things

– Nat. 1 –
The universe don't like you

– Nat. 1 –

– Nat. 1 –
You felt that in real life, didn’t you?

– Nat. 1 –
Wait, let me tell you something, LET ME TELL YOU SOMETHING!!!

– Nat. 1 –
Ok that's it, I'm going home

– Nat. 1 –
Houston, we got a problem
